highlights.title: Jensen Huang Commands Seoul Stage With Night of Street Theatre
highlights.description: For one Friday night, Hongdae wasn’t Seoul’s trendiest neighborhood. It was Jensen Huang’s stage.

highlights.title: Google Messages saves you from accidental Smart Replies with ‘Tap to draft’
highlights.description:
After testing in March, Google Messages is now rolling out a new “Tap to draft” behavior for Smart Replies that helps prevent accidental sends.
more…

highlights.title: Android Auto redesigned Google Maps alerts to be less distracting – it’s a huge upgrade [Gallery]
highlights.description:
If you’ve spent any time behind the wheel on Android Auto in the past couple of years, you’ve probably encountered the pop-up alerts on Google Maps and realized just how distracting they can be. Now, Google is rolling out a redesign and it’s a huge improvement.
more…
